chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-1985 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of main case.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 03.09.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Asad Ahmed, Advocate for the Respondent/KMC. Mr. Mehran Khan, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Asad Ahmed, Advocate has filed Memo of Appearance on behalf of the KMC along with a statement enclosing a report issued by the Director (Welfare) Finance & Accounts KMC, which reflects that the pension case of the petitioner has been finalized, with an amount of Rs.1,345,636/- being due and payable, and it being stated that his monthly pension is otherwise being paid on regular basis. He undertakes that the aforementioned amount will be settled within a period of thirty days from today. Learned counsel for the Petitioner agrees to that proposal. Under such circumstances, in view of the foregoing statement/ undertaking, the Petition stands disposed of by consent in the foregoing terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
